CustomField.description: Overall, does the proposed event comply with all applicable laws, rules, regulations, and Company policies including the Anti-Corruption Policy and local Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community?
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 11. Overall, does the proposed event comply with all applicable laws, rules, regulations, and Company policies including the Anti-Corruption Policy and local Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community?
CustomField.label: Is Anti-Corruption Policy
